purpose: Structured OPEN/DEFICIT draft for the R14 row x family/class matrix. Converts the R14 prose deficit into machine-readable work surface without solving it.
non_promotion_rule: This matrix is a scaffold for missing work. It does not solve R14, does not promote any row/family cell, and does not create theorem, substrate, or engineering readiness claims.

open_deficits.description: Fill source contacts for each non-UNKNOWN mathematical family cell.
Separate exact-work cells from thread-supported and generated cells.
Add R13 equality-layer statuses with source/check contacts.
Keep engineering/physics routes as unchecked until external source review.
Prime R1/R7/R13 cells have partial source contacts and source-coverage guard, but no full Prime class matrix or formal carrier theorem exists.

next_actions.action: Create validator for matrix schema presence/status fields only, not truth.
Populate first source-bound mathematical cells from existing SOURCE_EXTRACTED_CLAIMS and FORMAL_CHECK_TARGETS.
Use matrix to drive corporate roadmap risk language without hiding R14.
Populate additional mathematical family cells only from existing source-extracted claims and implemented check results; keep R14 OPEN_DEFICIT.
